scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run start -w server
scripts.tunnel: concurrently -n app,tunnel -c green,magenta "npm run start -w server" "npx --yes cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:3001"
